games.name: Color Food Eat
games.creator: AE Minigames
games.description: Challenge your friends to a colorful eating challenge in Color Food Eat! 🍕  How to play: 1. Buy food from the store the same as your team's color. 🍔 2. Return to your stand to place the food when your basket is full. 🥤 3. Eat the food on the stand. The team with the most Eats wins! 🍟  Roblox Premium
